events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May turns 79 today.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The iconic Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Jagger's Legacy
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young! Wishing a very happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger. What's your ultimate Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: MTV launched 45 years ago today, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years since MTV burst onto our screens! Remember the first video they ever played? It was The Buggles, naturally.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released 32 years ago today on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis changed the game with 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your favourite track from that iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, billed as '3 Days of Peace & Music', kicked off 57 years ago today.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million people descended on a dairy farm for '3 Days of Peace & Music'. The spirit of Woodstock lives on.

events.title: Elvis Presley's death anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, we lost the King. Elvis Presley's music continues to define generations. What's your favourite Elvis hit?

events.title: Tupac Shakur shooting 30th Anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since rap icon Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996. He later died on September 13.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years since the tragic events in Las Vegas. His impact on music remains undeniable.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix death 56th Anniversary
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago, we said goodbye to Jimi Hendrix, a true trailblazer who redefined the electric guitar. His music still sounds as fresh as ever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released 57 years ago today on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover alone is legendary. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' legendary frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are timeless.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis icon Liam Gallagher turns 54 today.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released 55 years ago today on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A powerful message that still resonates today.

events.title: First Apple iPod released 25 years ago
events.blurb: The first Apple iPod, which revolutionised portable music, was unveiled 25 years ago today on October 23, 2001.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Twenty-five years since Apple introduced the original iPod and changed how we listen to music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: It's James Bond Day, celebrating 007's big screen debut with 'Dr. No' in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating over six decades of 007. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the best theme song?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have been 86 today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message live on.
